briefs.title: Council to Consider: Burnaby RCMP Policing Update for August–November 2025
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to receive a status report from the RCMP covering policing operations from August to November 2025, along with a quarterly performance plan update for July to September 2025. No new rules or bylaws are proposed — this is an information-only update on local crime trends, traffic stats, and community policing activities.
